chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. S – 180 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For orders on CMA No.514/2023 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of main case 04.12.2023 None present. No intimation is received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed in non-prosecution along with listed application. J U D G E Abdul Basit
